stemHtml: Which of these statements about an auto-brake system (ABS) is correct?

options.a: For a given touchdown speed (GS) on a dry runway without use of reverse thrust the stopping distance is solely dependent on the selected ABS setting and independent of weight.
options.b: Not arming the auto-brake system will generate a take-off warning during take-off.
options.c: An auto-brake system automatically stops operating below a certain low (e.g. 15 kt) ground speed during landing.
options.d: An armed auto-brake system will always try to achieve the selected deceleration level directly after main wheel touchdown.
